/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/tinyim_v4.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyim_v4.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyim_v4.dir/protocol/FramingCodec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyim_v4.dir/protocol/JsonCodec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyim_v4.dir/storage/SqliteDB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyim_v4.dir/storage/UserDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyim_v4.dir/service/AuthService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyim_v4.dir/service/SessionManager.cpp.o -o tinyim_v4  -lsqlite3
